description_long: This object is a rectangular wooden planter box filled with a variety of lush green plants. The most prominent foliage features large, split leaves resembling those of a Monstera deliciosa, with additional long, slender leaves and a few smaller potted plants nestled within the main box. The planter appears to be well-maintained, with healthy, vibrant leaves and a mix of plant species, including a small flowering plant with a purple bloom. The wooden box has visible slats and a natural, unpainted finish, giving it a rustic appearance. Soil and possibly some decorative stones or mulch are visible at the base of the plants. The overall arrangement suggests it is designed for decorative purposes in an urban or garden setting.
description: A rectangular wooden planter box containing lush Monstera-like foliage, long slender leaves, and a small flowering plant, all arranged in healthy soil.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the wooden planter box with large split Monstera leaves and a small purple-flowered plant visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the planter and the dense arrangement of leaves, with the wooden slats clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite side of the planter and the spread of the foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the layered foliage and the box's rectangular shape.
attribute_pot_type: wooden planter box with small ceramic pot
attribute_plant_species: Monstera deliciosa, assorted foliage, and small flowering plant (possibly orchid)
